notes: v379 — Fixed the day-by-day ‘Portfolio value’ chart. It was leaving out the money reserved in your PENDING orders, so on an account with lots of pending buys the chart (and its % change) showed far less than the real account total. It now plots the FULL account value — cash + reserved + holdings — so the chart matches the headline total. This never affected your actual balances or the account total; those were always calculated correctly. Just the chart. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5).
